title: iSpawners
description: Virtual spawners that automatically store mob drops in a GUI
body:
![iSpawners logo](https://i.imgur.com/FkRjAEw.png)

iSpawners stores mob drops in a dedicated GUI for each spawner, with similar functionality to the DonutSMP spawners.

![iSpawners Spawner GUI](https://i.imgur.com/hD1Nmoi.png)

Each spawner collects mob drops and XP which can be collected either via the spawner storage menu or the spawned mob's head button

![iSpawners Spawner GUI](https://i.imgur.com/r1iiPbG.png)

Spawners can be stacked to increase the yield of the drops and xp

![Stacked Spawners](https://i.imgur.com/MFvmd0Y.png)

Default config:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![iSpawners config](https://i.imgur.com/qfaE7il.png)

</details>


Commands:
- /iSpawners
- /iSpawners about
- /iSpawners setspawnerstack
- /iSpawners givespawner <spawnertype>

Requirements:
EssentialsX

SQLite support coming soon!

Source code:
[Github](https://github.com/boggy539/iSpawners)
